command:
ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -i ~/.ssh/n8n_bridge jose@192.168.0.205 bash -s << 'ENDSSH'
cd /home/jose/moreno-ai

echo '=READ PREVIOUS REQUEST FOR CONTEXT='
cat memory/execution-pipeline/governed/phase9e10-runtime-candidate-20260621T203012Z-03cfe2/_background/bg-20260623T035336Z-9ea6c426/background-request.json 2>/dev/null | python3 -c "
import sys,json
d=json.load(sys.stdin)
req=d.get('request',{})
print('objective:', req.get('objective','')[:200])
print('context_paths:', req.get('context_paths'))
print('target_paths:', req.get('target_paths'))
print('max_attempts:', req.get('max_attempts'))
print('timeout_seconds:', req.get('timeout_seconds'))
"

echo '=CHECK CONTEXT FILES EXIST='
cat memory/execution-pipeline/governed/phase9e10-runtime-candidate-20260621T203012Z-03cfe2/_background/bg-20260623T035336Z-9ea6c426/background-request.json 2>/dev/null | python3 -c "
import sys,json
from pathlib import Path
d=json.load(sys.stdin)
req=d.get('request',{})
repo=Path('/home/jose/moreno-ai')
for cp in req.get('context_paths',[]):
    p=repo/str(cp)
    print(f'  context {cp}: {"EXISTS" if p.is_file() else "MISSING"} ({p.stat().st_size if p.is_file() else 0} bytes)')
"

echo '=OLLAMA STATUS='
curl -s --max-time 5 http://192.168.0.39:11434/api/tags 2>/dev/null | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print('models:', [m.get('name') for m in d.get('models',[])])" || echo 'OLLAMA_UNREACHABLE'
ENDSSH
